name: Pound Cake - Pd
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and 2 cups of sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add 4 eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt) to the batter, alternating with sour cream, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
4. Mix just until blended.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Pour the mixture into two lightly greased loaf pans.
7. Sprinkle 1/4 cup sugar mixed with 1 teaspoon vanilla evenly over the batter.
8. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cakes to cool thoroughly before serving; they are best served the next day.
